allow: PowerShell(ssh -o BatchMode=yes cncpi "systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running 2>/dev/null | grep -i cnc" 2>&1)

PowerShell(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('warmupDue:', d.get\('warmupDue'\), '| progressSec:', d.get\('warmupProgressSec'\), '| requiredSec:', d.get\('warmupRequiredSec'\), '| maintenanceDue:', d.get\('maintenanceDue'\)\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(ssh -o BatchMode=yes cncpi "pkill -f chromium; sleep 2; systemctl restart cnc-dashboard-frontend.service && echo OK" 2>&1)
PowerShell(ssh -o BatchMode=yes cncpi "pkill -f chromium || true; systemctl restart cnc-dashboard-frontend.service" 2>&1)
PowerShell(ssh -o BatchMode=yes cncpi "systemctl is-active cnc-dashboard-frontend.service cnc-dashboard-backend.service" 2>&1)
